user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Parnell Aerospace.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 10:15 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 10:49 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Parnell Aerospace

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 15:39 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Parnell Aerospace

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: security posture Discussion - Parnell Aerospace
Date: 2024-03-20
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is security posture.

[00:05:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:10:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:25:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:30:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.

[00:34:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:39:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.
